recommendations.title: Everybody’s Everything
recommendations.overview: The story of artist Lil Peep from his birth in Long Island and meteoric rise as a genre blending pop star & style icon, to his death due to an accidental opioid overdose in Arizona at just 21 years of age.

recommendations.title: UFC 21: Return Of The Champions
recommendations.overview: UFC 21: Return of the Champions was a mixed martial arts event held by the Ultimate Fighting Championship on July 16, 1999 at the Five Seasons Events Center in Cedar Rapids, Iowa. The event was seen live on pay per view in the United States, and late

recommendations.title: Elvis
recommendations.overview: This biopic traces Elvis Presley’s life from his impoverished childhood to his meteoric rise to stardom to his triumphant conquering of Las Vegas.

recommendations.title: Schumacher
recommendations.overview: Through exclusive interviews and archival footage, this documentary traces an intimate portrait of seven-time Formula 1 champion Michael Schumacher.
recommendations.director: Hanns-Bruno Kammertöns, Vanessa Nöcker, Michael Wech

recommendations.title: BLACKPINK: Light Up the Sky
recommendations.overview: Record-shattering Korean girl band BLACKPINK tell their story —  and detail the hard fought journey of the dreams and trials behind their meteoric rise.

recommendations.title: Bruce Lee, the Legend
recommendations.overview: The Official Golden Harvest tribute to the Master of the Martial Arts Film, Bruce Lee.

recommendations.title: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.

recommendations.title: Dance with Me

recommendations.title: Supersonic

recommendations.title: Warrior
recommendations.overview: The youngest son of an alcoholic former boxer returns home, where he's trained by his father for competition in a mixed martial arts tournament – a path that puts the fighter on a collision course with his estranged, older brother.
